hero.title: Where Business Meets Technology
hero.subtitle: CBS IT Union
hero.description: Connect with students across Data Science, Digital Business, and Information Systems. Collaborate on projects, attend events, and shape the future of tech.

aboutSection.title: What is CBS IT Union?
aboutSection.description: CBS IT Union is a student-led organization dedicated to fostering collaboration, innovation, and career opportunities at the intersection of business and technology. We bring together an interdisciplinary community of learners and leaders.

features.title: Collaboration
features.description: Work with peers across disciplines to solve real-world challenges and build meaningful projects.

features.title: Innovation
features.description: Explore emerging technologies and business trends through workshops, talks, and hands-on learning.

features.title: Opportunity
features.description: Connect with industry leaders and peers to advance your career in tech and business.

cta.title: Ready to Get Involved?
cta.subtitle: Attend our next event or explore partnership opportunities.
